title: weinmannia rubifolia
intro: Weinmannia rubifolia, also known as red rātā, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae, native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Weinmannia rubifolia is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in topical applications to treat skin conditions. The health benefits of Weinmannia rubifolia include reducing pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine.
